name: Huaxinda Tech
notes: Long-term partner, VIP customer, but last batch had a 10% DOA rate — need to monitor quality corrective action progress. Primary Dell and HP distributor with strong bargaining power.

name: Botong IT
notes: Competitive pricing, but rejected our purchase order 2 months ago due to insufficient support capacity. Primary HP ProLiant channel partner.

name: Lenovo Enterprise
notes: Standard partnership model, fixed pricing with no discounts. Product quality is stable and deliveries are on time, but lacks flexibility.

name: Xinchen Tech
notes: Authorized Huawei distributor with a notable price advantage (approximately 8% below Huawei direct sales). However, affected by Huawei supply chain issues, delivery capability is currently uncertain.
